<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Rozol Cattlan the Prudent requests the aid of a Disciple of the Hand with sufficient elbow grease to see <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>him</If> smoothly through a difficult task.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 6 and above.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Rozol Cattlan the Prudent requests the aid of a Disciple of the Hand with sufficient elbow grease to see <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>him</If> smoothly through a difficult task.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 6 and above.

1:
Rozol Cattlan has asked you to synthesize for him a component for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>'s aerodynamo─a delicate instrument which will help keep the airship aloft after takeoff. The Ehcatl Nine knotcounter has personally spoken with Templeton and does not believe you will need to bribe the Highwind Skyways representative to gain access to the crafting facilities at the Observatorium. The knotcounter also does not believe a thing Templeton says, so he warns you to be ready to perform some random task for the unappreciative sot.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

4:
Templeton is every bit as dishonest as advertised, and now you have full access to the Highwind Skyways temporary crafting facilities. Use the materials given to you by Rozol Cattlan and inspected by Templeton to synthesize a high-quality aerodynamo component, and deliver the finished product to the faction.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Production II<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Templeton.
